general.a: Yes. Every AEIRA fragrance is formulated in-house by our perfumers using premium aromatic ingredients. Some are composed as our interpretation of well-loved luxury profiles, but each is its own distinct blend — never a direct copy.
Most AEIRA fragrances are Eau de Parfum (18-22% oil concentration), with select releases as Parfum (22-30%) for maximum longevity and depth.
Orders within India are dispatched within 24-48 hours and typically arrive in 3-5 business days. You'll receive tracking details by email and WhatsApp as soon as your order ships.

general.q: Do you offer samples or discovery sets?
general.a: Yes, we offer a curated discovery set of 2ml vials so you can experience our collection before committing to a full bottle. Message us on WhatsApp to add one to your order.
All AEIRA fragrances are cruelty-free and never tested on animals. We work only with certified ethical fragrance houses.

contact.a: Our team is available Monday to Saturday, 10:00 AM to 7:00 PM IST. We respond to WhatsApp messages and emails within a few hours during business days.

contact.q: Can I visit an AEIRA store?
contact.a: AEIRA currently operates as an online-first boutique. For private consultations or bulk/corporate gifting enquiries, please reach out via WhatsApp to arrange an appointment.

contact.q: How do I track my order?
contact.a: Once your order ships, you'll receive a tracking link via email and WhatsApp. You can also reach out to our support team anytime for a live update.
